items.title: New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh’s decision to drop forward guidance may actually empower the central bank’s other policymakers
items.summary: Those officials frequently give public speeches, and their remarks will get even more attention as financial markets seek clues about what the Fed may do next.
items.titleZh: 美联储新任主席凯文·沃什决定放弃前瞻性指导，实际上可能会赋予央行其他政策制定者权力
items.summaryZh: 这些官员经常发表公开演讲，随着金融市场寻求美联储下一步行动的线索，他们的言论将受到更多关注。

items.title: Nothing scraps next CMF phone after memory prices make it too expensive
items.summary: Nothing co-founder Akis Evangelidis, the executive behind the CMF line, said the firm had been working on a successor to the CMF Phone 2 Pro, but current memory costs made the device impossible to release without undermining the point of the brand.Read Entire…
items.titleZh: 内存价格过高，没有什么能淘汰下一代CMF手机
items.summaryZh: CMF产品线背后的高管、联合创始人Akis Evangelidis表示，该公司一直在研究CMF Phone 2 Pro的继任者，但目前的内存成本使得该设备无法在不损害品牌价值的情况下发布。阅读全文…

items.title: The math behind Silicon Valley's millionaire factory
items.summary: How stock awards at OpenAI, Anthropic, and SpaceX grew into life-changing fortunes.
items.titleZh: 硅谷百万富翁工厂背后的数学
items.summaryZh: OpenAI、Anthropic和SpaceX的股票奖励如何发展成为改变人生的财富。

items.title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
items.summary: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.
items.titleZh: 人工智能建设为科技投资者关注债券市场提供了新的理由
items.summaryZh: 科技巨头正在耗尽现金储备，并在雄心勃勃的数据中心建设中增加债务，这一动态迫使投资者关注利率。

items.title: Here is how SpaceX could turn up in your current investments
items.summary: SpaceX stock hit the market last week. Here's how it could turn up in your retirement or investment portfolio.
items.titleZh: 以下是SpaceX如何出现在您当前的投资中
items.summaryZh: SpaceX的股票上周上市。以下是它如何出现在你的退休或投资组合中。

items.title: The Seven-Headed Hydra at the End of Finance
items.summary: The company has mutated into something that defies both comparison and logic.
items.titleZh: 金融终结的七头九头蛇
items.summaryZh: 这家公司已经变成了一个既无法比较又无法逻辑的公司。

items.title: Executive pay climbed again in 2025—and the CEO-to-worker gap kept widening
items.summary: The gap between CEO and worker pay hit a four-year high in 2025, with median CEO compensation rising 13% to $4.75 million, per new data.
items.titleZh: 2025年，高管薪酬再次攀升，CEO与员工的差距不断扩大
items.summaryZh: 根据最新数据，首席执行官和员工薪酬之间的差距在2025年达到四年来的最高点，其中首席执行官薪酬中位数增长了13%，达到475万美元。

items.title: Forget prompt engineering: 'Loop engineering' is all the rage now
items.summary: Claude Code creator Boris Cherny says he doesn't "write the prompt anymore." Here's how loop engineering is changing coding.
items.titleZh: 忘记快速工程：“循环工程”现在风靡一时
items.summaryZh: Claude Code的创建者Boris Cherny表示，他不再“编写提示”。以下是循环工程如何改变编码。
